output.sparql:
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
SELECT ?president ?presidentLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q30 p:P35 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P35 ?president ; pq:P580 ?startTime .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?statement pq:P582 ?endTime
  }
  .
  ?president rdfs:label ?presidentLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?presidentLabel) = "en")
  FILTER(?startTime <= NOW () &&(! BOUND(?endTime) || ?endTime > NOW ()))
}
ORDER BY DESC(?startTime)
LIMIT 1
